## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run doctor` passes (PDF/Playwright may show as optional)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `node scan.mjs --dry-run` runs cleanly
- [ ] Any new user-facing strings are in `config/i18n/{en,es}.yml` (no hardcoded copy)
- [ ] EN/ES key parity holds (the i18n test stays green)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ROADMAP / CHANGELOG) if behavior changed
